body.body: Expand D074 intent gate in basal_ganglia.py to skip response habit type when parsed_intent is factual_question or knowledge_request. Let those fall through to LLM + winnow. See #254.
body.title: D074 expansion: factual_question bypasses response habits (#254)
body.result: basal_ganglia.py: added knowledge_request to _QUESTION_INTENTS; added G-OVN-1d gate — ALL response habits skip on factual_question or knowledge_request, fall through to LLM+winnow (D074 expansion, #254). G-OVN-1c kept for backwards compat.
